faults_fixed_during_audit: metric-aggregator: added P6 AES-256-CBC decryption for encrypted report ingestion
compliance-reporter: upgraded exportPDF to generate real PDF via jsPDF (Uint8Array)
compliance-reporter: generateReport now collects safety policy results + test results
FeedbackTriage: added severity/priority filter alongside category filter
test_portal_access_control.ts: created dedicated 5-test access control suite
test_metric_aggregation: added encrypted P6 report ingestion test
test_compliance_reporting: added safety policy + test result integration test

features: registerCompany(name, licenseKey, options) — registers with hashed ID, 90d default expiry
validateLicense(key) — checks active/suspended/expired, remaining seats, features
ingestEncryptedReport(encryptedData) — decrypts P6 AES-256-CBC reports and ingests
getTrendView(metricName, timeframe) — daily average trend points
detectAnomalies(threshold=2σ) — z-score anomaly detection with low/medium/high severity
generateReport(standard, by, companyId, auditLog, profiles, safetyResults?, testResults?)
SOC2 (5 sections), IEC62443 (6 sections), ISO27001 (9 sections)
Collects audit logs, compliance profiles, safety policy results, AND test results
exportPDF(reportData) — generates real PDF using jsPDF (Uint8Array output)
verifyAuditTrail(auditLog) — chronological order, valid decisions, required fields

components: CompanyRegistry.tsx — company table with status indicators, suspend/reactivate
MetricDashboard.tsx — metric cards with bar charts, stdDev coloring, anomaly banner
ComplianceExport.tsx — standard selector (SOC2/IEC/ISO), report preview with score ring, PDF/JSON export
FeedbackTriage.tsx — category filter + severity/priority filter, status workflow

acceptance.notes: P7 Enterprise Portal complete after audit fix cycle. All 5 gaps resolved: P6 encrypted report decryption, real jsPDF generation, severity filtering in FeedbackTriage, access control test suite, and safety policy + test result collection in compliance reports. Full suite: 483/483 passing across 59 files with zero core violations.
